message:
feat: Spec Evolution Lab — interactive forensic visualization of spec corpus

Add the Spec Evolution Lab, an interactive tool that lets visitors explore
how the FrankenTUI specification evolved across revisions. This is the
marquee feature of the "How It Was Built" section.

Core implementation:
- Heavily reworked spec-evolution-lab.tsx with FrankenTUI-themed dialogs,
  corpus A-vs-B diff mode (DiffSource = "commitPatch" | "corpusAB"),
  side-by-side rendering via corpusOpsToSideBySideRows, improved bar
  chart hover transitions, syntax highlighting with hljs, and refined
  typography throughout
- New spec-evolution-lab.module.css for component-scoped styles
- New lib/spec-evolution-compare.ts with extracted diff utilities:
  myersDiffTextLines, computeFileChangeSummary, computeTextStats,
  buildCorpusText
- Unit tests in lib/spec-evolution-compare.test.ts

Integration:
- New app/how-it-was-built/spec-evolution-lab/ route directory
- Updated how-it-was-built/page.tsx with new two-column card layout
  featuring "Open Lab" and "Legacy Artifact" CTAs, origin protocol
  description, and FrankenBolt/FrankenStitch icon imports
- Extended war-stories-nav.spec.ts with a new test that navigates to the
  lab page, waits for dataset load, verifies legend open/close interaction,
  and asserts zero console errors

Dataset:
- public/how-it-was-built/frankentui_spec_evolution_dataset.json containing
  the full spec revision corpus for the visualization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,14 +1,14 @@ "use client"; import Link from "next/link"; -import { ArrowRight, Clock } from "lucide-react"; +import { ArrowRight, Clock, Link2 } from "lucide-react"; import { motion } from "framer-motion"; import { changelog, tweets, buildLogLines, devSessionInsights, devProcessStats } from "@/lib/content"; import SectionShell from "@/components/section-shell"; import Timeline from "@/components/timeline"; import TweetWall from "@/components/tweet-wall"; import FrankenEye from "@/components/franken-eye"; -import { FrankenContainer, NeuralPulse } from "@/components/franken-elements"; +import { FrankenContainer, NeuralPulse, FrankenBolt, FrankenStitch } from "@/components/franken-elements"; import FrankenGlitch from "@/components/franken-glitch"; const keyStats = [ @@ -239,6 +239,101 @@ export default function HowItWasBuiltPage() { + {/* ── Spec Evolution Lab ─────────────────────────────── */} + + +
+
+
+ + +
+
+ New + + Interactive Lab +
+

Time-lapse diff explorer

+

+ Scrub through commits and inspect diffs, rendered markdown snapshots, and the evidence ledger for each + categorized change-group. +

+ +
    +
  • + + Stacked taxonomy bars (day/hour/15m/5m) with bucket legend and mobile-friendly bucket details. +
    • +
  • + + Timeline scrubber with keyboard navigation (←/→), search (/), and help (?). +
    • +
  • + + Diff viewer (unified + side-by-side), plus rendered markdown snapshot with responsive tables. +
    • +
+ +
+ + Open Lab + + + + Legacy Artifact + + +
+
+
+ +
+
+

Origin Protocol

+

+ FrankenTUI’s spec corpus evolved extremely fast. This lab is the “forensics view”: it reconstructs what + changed, when it changed, and why, so the project is auditable and easier to extend. +

+
+
+
Revision_Taxonomy
+
+ Commits are manually grouped and labeled across 10 buckets (logic fixes, architecture, scrivening, + alien-artifact math, etc.). +
+
+
+
Forensic_Inspection
+
+ Tables and dense evidence are rendered without horizontal scroll, using stacked key/value layouts + and tap-to-open legends. +
+
+
+ +
+
+ + + {/* ── Sprint Git Log (Selected) ───────────────────────────── */}
